title: Turkish Cornmeal Kofte
description: A traditional Turkish dish, these cornmeal kofte are crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, kofte, turkey, shattering, eggs, bread crumbs, salt, and black pepper.
3. Gradually add the milk, stirring until the mixture is well combined.
4. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
5. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
8. Optional: serve with a side of tzatziki sauce or a dollop of yogurt.
